name: invoice_lines
title: Invoice Lines
description: Line items belonging to one invoice/quote/credit note. line_total_cents and line_tax_cents are stamped by the invoice_totals handler on every create/update/delete. See plan/vocabulary/20-invoice-spec.md.

fields.name: invoice_id
fields.label: Invoice
fields.help: Set once at creation and not intended to change after. Not schema read_only -- see dbbasic-package.json's description for why (a required, client-submitted-at-creation field cannot also be read_only on this platform: the server rejects any client submission of a read_only field, even the first one).

fields.name: quantity
fields.label: Quantity
fields.help: A count/measure, not money -- may be fractional (e.g. 2.5 hours). This is the one deliberate use of a float-shaped field in this package; every *_cents field stays integer.

fields.name: line_total_cents
fields.label: Line Total (cents)
fields.help: Stamped by invoice_totals: floor(quantity * unit_price_cents). Never user-entered.

fields.name: tax_rate_bps
fields.label: Tax Rate (bps)
fields.help: Basis points, e.g. 825 = 8.25%. Optional; blank or 0 means no tax on this line.

fields.name: line_tax_cents
fields.label: Line Tax (cents)
fields.help: Stamped by invoice_totals: line_total_cents * tax_rate_bps // 10000 (floor, not round).
